# AdeHQ

> AdeHQ is an AI workforce platform for hiring, managing, and orchestrating persistent AI employees alongside unlimited human teammates. Pay for AI work capacity through weekly AI Work Hours — not per-seat pricing.

AdeHQ is built for solo founders, freelancers, agencies, and small teams who want accountable AI workers with roles, memory, approvals, and work logs — not another session-based chatbot.

## Product summary

- Hire AI employees with names, roles, personalities, and persistent memory
- Organize work in rooms and topics instead of endless chat threads
- Orchestrate which AI employees lead, collaborate, or stay quiet
- Govern external actions with human approvals and audit trails
- Meter AI workload with simple weekly AI Work Hours instead of token math
- Include unlimited human members and unlimited AI employees on every plan

## Positioning

AdeHQ is an alternative to:
- session-based AI chat tools like ChatGPT or Claude for team workflows
- per-seat collaboration tools like Slack with bolt-on bots
- generic agent builders without persistent employee identity

## Differentiators

- Unlimited human team members on every plan
- Unlimited AI employees on every plan
- No per-seat pricing
- Persistent employee identity, memory, and work history
- Hire-by-role experience with candidates and job briefs
- Work graph with approvals, work logs, and source-linked memory
